bug_description: The `span_start` tracking omits the `if depth == 0:` guard before assigning `span_start = i`. Without the guard, `span_start` is overwritten on every open bracket, including nested ones. When a top-level span contains nested brackets, `span_start` is updated to point at the innermost open bracket position. The reported span start is therefore the last nested open bracket, not the outermost one — producing wrong (start, end) pairs for any input with nesting depth > 1.
